---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for CopyTrail
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?

A clear description of the problem you are trying to solve. (e.g. "I always have to ...")

## Describe the solution you'd like

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Describe alternatives you considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you have already tried.

## Is this in scope for V1?

Please confirm the feature does not involve any of the following (which are permanently out of scope):
- [ ] Cloud sync or backup
- [ ] User accounts or logins
- [ ] Telemetry or analytics
- [ ] AI or machine-learning features
- [ ] Browser extensions
- [ ] Network calls

## Additional context

Add any other context, mockups, or examples here.
